title: PropertyHub
subtitle: Web app for homeowner-homebuyer bidding and negotiation
role: Software Developer (IS216 Web Application Development II Group Project)

sections.title: Project Overview
sections.body: PropertyHub streamlines homeowner and buyer interactions through direct negotiation, bidding workflows, and integrated payment/mapping capabilities.

highlights: Developed a responsive web application enabling direct bidding and negotiation between homeowners and homebuyers.
Built dynamic interfaces with HTML/CSS, JavaScript, and Vue.
Integrated Firebase, Stripe, and Google Maps API for data, payments, and mapping features.
